title: NO STRIP MINING!
description: A simple data pack altering ore generation to only spawn next to air. This will force players to explore caves, cliffsides and mountains to obtain their resources!
body:
A simple datapack that ONLY allows ore to spawn next to air. This means that players must visit mountains, cliffsides and caves to obtain their resources! Ore spawning is boosted a bit and ores that were once buried are buried no longer (including nether ores and ancient debris). 
I also did some mod support:
- create
- vs clockwork
- galosphere
- gobber2 (I also excluded the lucky block ores from spawning)
- pigsteel
- betterend
- betternether

Q/A

Q: Can I use this in my modpack?

A: Go wild! Just please credit me.
